          const groups = document.querySelectorAll('.docs-navbar__group');
          let timeout;

          const handleMouseEnter = (event) => {
            try {
              const isKeyPress = event.type === 'keypress';
              if (isKeyPress && event.key !== 'Enter') return;
  
              const dropdown = event?.currentTarget?.querySelector('.docs-navbar__dropdown');
              const chevron = event?.currentTarget?.querySelector('.docs-navbar__group__title');
  
              groups.forEach(group => {
                const otherDropdown = group.querySelector('.docs-navbar__dropdown');
                const otherChevron = group.querySelector('.docs-navbar__group__title');
  
                if (otherDropdown && otherDropdown !== dropdown) {
                  otherDropdown?.classList?.remove('visible');
                  otherChevron?.classList?.remove('selected');
                }
              });
  
              if (dropdown) {
                clearTimeout(timeout);
                chevron?.classList?.add('selected');
                dropdown?.classList?.add('visible');
              }
  
              if (dropdown && dropdown?.setAttribute) {
                dropdown.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
              }
            } catch (error) {
              console.trace(error);
            }
          };

          const handleMouseLeave = (event) => {
            try {
              const dropdown = event.currentTarget.querySelector('.docs-navbar__dropdown');
              const chevron = event.currentTarget.querySelector('.docs-navbar__group__title');

              if (dropdown) {
                timeout = setTimeout(() => {
                  chevron?.classList?.remove('selected');
                  dropdown?.classList?.remove('visible');
                }, 300);
              }
              
              if (dropdown && dropdown?.setAttribute) {
                dropdown.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
              }            
            } catch(error) {
              console.trace(error)
            }
          };

          groups.forEach((group) => {
            group.addEventListener('mouseenter', handleMouseEnter);
            group.addEventListener('keypress', handleMouseEnter);
            group.addEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave);
          });
  },props:{"on":"load","type":"function","preload":false}},{s:function(){
          window.dxCollaboratorsModalOpen = false;

          window.openCollaboratorsModal = function() {
            const modalContainer = document.getElementById('dx-collaborators-modal-container');
            
            if (modalContainer) {
              modalContainer.style.display = 'block';
              window.dxCollaboratorsModalOpen = true;
              document.body.classList.add('overflow-hidden');
            }
          };

          window.closeCollaboratorsModal = function() {
            const modalContainer = document.getElementById('dx-collaborators-modal-container');
            
            if (modalContainer) {
              modalContainer.style.display = 'none';
              window.dxCollaboratorsModalOpen = false;
              document.body.classList.remove('overflow-hidden');
            }
          };

          document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            setupCollaboratorsModal();
          });

          if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', setupCollaboratorsModal);
          } else {
            setupCollaboratorsModal();
          }

          function setupCollaboratorsModal() {
            setTimeout(() => {
              let collaboratorsMenuItem = document.querySelector('.menu-logged-integrations-panel-item-container.dx-collaborators-menu-item a');
              
              if (!collaboratorsMenuItem) {
                collaboratorsMenuItem = document.querySelector('.dx-collaborators-menu-item a');
              }
              
              if (!collaboratorsMenuItem) {
                collaboratorsMenuItem = document.querySelector('.dx-collaborators-menu-item .menu-logged-integrations-panel-item');
              }
              
              if (collaboratorsMenuItem) {
                collaboratorsMenuItem.removeAttribute('href');
                collaboratorsMenuItem.removeAttribute('target');
                collaboratorsMenuItem.style.cursor = 'pointer';

                collaboratorsMenuItem.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                  e.preventDefault();
                  e.stopPropagation();
                  window.openCollaboratorsModal();
                });
              } else {
                const observer = new MutationObserver((mutations) => {
                  mutations.forEach((mutation) => {
                    if (mutation.type === 'childList') {
                      const collaboratorsMenuItem = document.querySelector('.dx-collaborators-menu-item a') || 
                                                   document.querySelector('.dx-collaborators-menu-item .menu-logged-integrations-panel-item');
                      
                      if (collaboratorsMenuItem) {
                        observer.disconnect();
                        
                        collaboratorsMenuItem.removeAttribute('href');
                        collaboratorsMenuItem.removeAttribute('target');
                        collaboratorsMenuItem.style.cursor = 'pointer';

                        collaboratorsMenuItem.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                          e.preventDefault();
                          e.stopPropagation();
                          window.openCollaboratorsModal();
                        });
                      }
                    }
                  });
                });

                observer.observe(document.body, {
                  childList: true,
                  subtree: true
                });

                setTimeout(() => {
                  observer.disconnect();
                }, 10000);
              }

              setupModalCloseButtons();
            }, 1000);
          }

          function setupModalCloseButtons() {
            setTimeout(() => {
              const goButton = document.querySelector('.dx-collaborators-go-button');
              const cancelButton = document.querySelector('.dx-collaborators-cancel-button');
              const closeButton = document.querySelector('.dx-custom-modal__close-button');
              
              if (goButton) {
                goButton.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                  e.preventDefault();
                  e.stopPropagation();
                  window.open('/collaborators', '_blank');
                  window.closeCollaboratorsModal();
                });
              }

              if (cancelButton) {
                cancelButton.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                  e.preventDefault();
                  e.stopPropagation();
                  window.closeCollaboratorsModal();
                });
              }

              if (closeButton) {
                closeButton.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                  e.preventDefault();
                  e.stopPropagation();
                  window.closeCollaboratorsModal();
                });
              }

              const modalContainer = document.getElementById('dx-collaborators-modal-container');
              if (modalContainer) {
                modalContainer.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                  if (e.target === modalContainer || e.target.classList.contains('dx-custom-modal__backdrop')) {
                    window.closeCollaboratorsModal();
                  }
                });
              }

              document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
                if (e.key === 'Escape' && window.dxCollaboratorsModalOpen) {
                  window.closeCollaboratorsModal();
                }
              });
            }, 100);
          }
